       (SELECT MAX(d.A11) FROM district d) - (SELECT MIN(d.A11) FROM district d) AS gap

254:
SELECT CAST(cnt AS REAL) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bond) AS percentage
FROM (
  WITH pair_counts AS (
    SELECT
      CASE WHEN a.element < a2.element THEN a.element || '|' || a2.element
           ELSE a2.element || '|' || a.element END AS elem_pair,
      COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM connected c
      JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
      JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    GROUP BY elem_pair
  ),
  most_common AS (
    SELECT elem_pair FROM pair_counts ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1
  )
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS cnt
  FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    CROSS JOIN most_common mp
  WHERE
    CASE WHEN a.element < a2.element THEN a.element || '|' || a2.element
         ELSE a2.element || '|' || a.element END = mp.elem_pair
);	----- bird -----	toxicology

   CASE 
      WHEN male_inpatient > male_outpatient THEN 'More in-patient' 
      WHEN male_inpatient < male_outpatient THEN 'More outpatient' 
      ELSE 'Equal' 
   END AS comparison,
   CAST(male_inpatient AS REAL) * 100.0 / NULLIF(male_outpatient,0) AS deviation_percentage
FROM (
   SELECT 
      SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX='M' AND e.Admission='+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatient,
      SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX='M' AND e.Admission='-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatient

SELECT 
  (SELECT MIN(s.total_cons) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
  ) s WHERE s.Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT MIN(s.total_cons) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
  ) s WHERE s.Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT MIN(s.total_cons) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
  ) s WHERE s.Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT MIN(s.total_cons) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
  ) s WHERE s.Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT MIN(s.total_cons) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
  ) s WHERE s.Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT MIN(s.total_cons) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
  ) s WHERE s.Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT Segment FROM (
   WITH seg_inc AS (
      SELECT c.Segment,
             ((y2013.Consumption - y2012.Consumption) / y2013.Consumption) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth y2012 ON c.CustomerID = y2012.CustomerID AND substr(y2012.Date,1,4)='2012'
      JOIN yearmonth y2013 ON c.CustomerID = y2013.CustomerID AND substr(y2013.Date,1,4)='2013'
      WHERE c.Currency='EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
   )
   SELECT Segment FROM seg_inc ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
   UNION ALL
   SELECT Segment FROM seg_inc ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1
)	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1526:
SELECT
  (c2012 - c2013) / c2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    (SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k
                         WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25')
       AND Date LIKE '2012%') AS c2012,
    (SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k
                         WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25')
       AND Date LIKE '2013%') AS c2013
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT t.CustomerID, SUM(t.Price)/SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Price) DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
